steps.title: Find the defining claim
steps.content:
The notes state that a mass fraction is the ratio of the total mass of an element to the combined mass of all elements in a given environment.
That definition is exactly what the question asks for: oxygen’s mass relative to all Earth’s elements.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
Choice C repeats the given mass fraction for oxygen, 297,000 ppm, which by definition expresses oxygen’s mass compared to the total mass of all elements.
The other three either compare oxygen to vanadium, give a generic definition without the specific value, or incorrectly use vanadium’s value for oxygen.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
